name: aurora-menubar
title: Aurora Menubar
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Horizontal application menu bar with compact Aurora menu items.
docs:
Aurora Menubar installs with its declared Aurora registry dependencies.

Install `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-dropdown-menu`, and `aurora-button` first; the shadcn CLI resolves these automatically through the @aurora registry namespace.

Default install target: `@ui/aurora/menubar.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-dropdown-menu`, `aurora-button`.
